---
title: "Resources"
---

## Workshop materials

All workshop materials will be made available on this website after the event.

## More or less relevant resources

FAIR principles & practice: https://www.go-fair.org/fair-principles/

UKRI Good research resource hub: https://www.ukri.org/manage-your-award/good-research-resource-hub/ 

Preregistration: https://osf.io/

Embassy of Good Science: https://embassy.science/wiki/Special:BrowseData/Theme
